requests](https://img.shields.io/github/issues-pr/QuingKhaos/cubium-cubnut-agriculture?label=Pull%20Requests&style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/QuingKhaos/cubium-cubnut-agriculture/pulls)

# Wooden Cubium: Cubnut Agriculture

Grow Cubnuts in the ultradense lava on Cubium and process it to wood.

## Compatibility

- If you have [Cubium: Lignumis Combatibility](https://mods.factorio.com/mod/cubium-lignumis-compat) installed, the easy cube jelly to wood recipe is removed.

## Credits

Big thanks to [Talandar99](https://mods.factorio.com/user/Talandar99) with [Carbonut Agriculture](https://mods.factorio.com/mod/carbonut_agriculture), on which this mod is based and who created new Cubnut assets for me.
